backend/main.mo: Main actor for the marketplace backend, defining types and state for users, vendors, stores, products, orders, carts, payouts, and transactions, with mixins for storage, authorization, and user approval, plus Stripe and HTTP outcall integration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines OldActor and NewActor state shapes (identical) and exports a no-op `run` function to carry persistent state forward during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two VendorDashboard integration features (StoreListManager and StoreSelector) to their source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, key components, and notable fixes or changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fragrance.Intl React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the Vite/TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, products, cart, checkout, orders, vendor, admin, payment, auctions, trade offers) inside a shared Header/Footer layout with profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Displays a list of user approval requests with pending/approved/rejected status badges, and allows admins to approve or reject users via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/AuctionMan: Admin panel that lists all auctions in a sortable table and provides cancel/finalize actions for each auction.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel that displays all orders in a filterable table and allows admins to update individual order statuses via a dropdown.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutMana: Admin panel for managing vendor payouts with a status-update table and an inline commission rate editor.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutStat: Small presentational component that renders a color-coded badge for a given PayoutStatus value.
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Form that lets an admin assign a role (admin, user, or guest) to a user identified by their Principal ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/TradeOffer: Admin panel that lists all trade offers in a sortable table and allows admins to cancel individual offers.
frontend/src/components/auctions/Auction: Displays a single auction as a card with title, status badge, pricing, a live countdown timer, and a navigation button to the auction detail page.
Reusable countdown component that calculates and displays time remaining until an auction ends, supporting both compact (inline) and full (block) display modes.
Renders a responsive grid of AuctionCard components with loading skeleton placeholders and an empty-state message.
Small badge component that displays an auction's status (active, ended, canceled) with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidForm: Form component for placing a bid on an active auction, enforcing a minimum bid amount and showing success/error toasts via the usePlaceBid mutation.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidHist: Displays a scrollable, time-sorted list of past bids for an auction showing bidder address, amount, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog shown to new users to collect their name and optional email, saving the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: Popover cart icon in the navbar that shows item count and a preview list of cart items with a link to the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, quantity, line total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Order summary sidebar component that calculates and displays the cart subtotal and a checkout button.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Displays a checkout order review with item list, shipping address, subtotal, and a Stripe payment button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: Renders a shipping address form with fields for street, city, state, zip, and country, supporting both controlled and uncontrolled modes, with a skip option for digital-only orders.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand logo, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart dropdown, and a user profile dropdown that adapts based on authentication, vendor approval, and admin status.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to the shop and vendor registration pages.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Renders a color-coded badge for an order status value using predefined styles for each OrderStatus enum variant.
Displays a horizontal step timeline showing order progress through pending, processing, shipped, and delivered stages, with special handling for canceled orders.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Renders a single product card with image, title, type badge, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button that triggers a mutation and shows toast notifications.
Displays a responsive grid of ProductCard components with skeleton loading states and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Provides keyword search, category, product type, and sort-order filter controls with a reset button for the product listing page.
frontend/src/components/trade/CounterOff: Form component for submitting a counter trade offer, allowing the user to specify a cash adjustment and optional note based on an existing offer.
frontend/src/components/trade/NewTradeOf: Form for creating a new trade offer with dynamic offered/requested item lists, cash adjustment, note, and target principal fields.
frontend/src/components/trade/TradeOffer: Displays a single trade offer's details (items, cash adjustment, note, status) with accept, reject, cancel, and counter action buttons based on perspective.
Renders a list of TradeOfferCard components with skeleton loading states and an empty-state message, supporting incoming or outgoing perspectives.
Standalone badge component that displays a color-coded trade offer status label (pending, accepted, rejected, canceled, countered).
frontend/src/components/vendor/CreateAuc: A form component for vendors to create auctions, with fields for title, product ID, description, starting/reserve price, and end time, using the useCreateAuction mutation hook with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: A reusable form component for creating or editing a vendor product, handling fields like title, price, category, and product type, and dispatching create/update mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Displays and manages a vendor's product list with options to add, edit, and delete products, using a dialog-based ProductForm and filtering products by vendorId.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreForm: A modal dialog for creating or editing a vendor store, pre-populating fields from existing store data and dispatching create/update mutations on submit.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreList: Manages a vendor's list of stores with the ability to create, edit, and toggle active/inactive status, enforcing a maximum of 5 stores per vendor.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreSele: A dropdown selector component that lets vendors switch between their stores, displaying each store's name and active/inactive status badge.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorAuc: Displays a vendor's auctions list with live countdown timers, cancel functionality, and a collapsible form to create new auctions.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOrd: Renders a sortable table of a vendor's past transactions showing order details, gross amount, commission, and net payout with a link to each receipt.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPay: Shows a vendor's payout history in a table along with summary cards for total earned and pending amounts, using status badges for each payout.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: Form component that allows a vendor to edit and save their store profile fields (name, description, contact) via the updateVendorProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: Multi-field registration form for new vendors to create a store profile with optional logo upload, then submits an approval request to the admin.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions including user profiles, roles, approvals, products, cart, orders, payouts, auctions, and trade offers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines a luxury fragrance-themed CSS variable palette for light/dark modes, and adds print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders panels for vendor approvals, role assignment, order management, payouts, auctions, and trade offers, with access control based on identity and admin status.
frontend/src/pages/AuctionDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single auction showing bid info, a live countdown timer, a bid form, and bid history, fetched by auction ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/Auctions.tsx: Page that lists all active auctions in a grid layout, fetched via the useListActiveAuctions query hook.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with product details and a summary panel, with an empty-state fallback and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout page that collects shipping address and reviews the cart before initiating a Stripe checkout session, redirecting the user to Stripe's hosted payment page.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, three feature highlights, and a grid of up to 8 featured products sorted by quantity descending.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Displays a sorted list of the current user's orders with status badges, totals, and navigation links to order details and receipt pages.
frontend/src/pages/NewTradeOffer.tsx: Page that renders the NewTradeOfferForm component inside a card layout, allowing users to propose a new trade offer.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page that fetches and displays a specific order's status timeline, items, total, and links to receipt or continued shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceipt.tsx: Printable invoice/receipt page for a specific order, showing order details, shipping address, line items, transaction info, and a print button.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Payment cancellation confirmation page shown after a Stripe checkout is abandoned, displaying the order reference and links to return to cart or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Handles the Stripe payment success redirect by confirming the payment via session ID, displaying order details, and auto-redirecting to the order page after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Renders the product listing page with search/filter controls and a product grid, fetching products based on the current filter state.
frontend/src/pages/TradeOffers.tsx: Displays the current user's incoming and outgoing trade offers in separate tabs, with a button to create new trade offers.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Vendor dashboard page showing store selector, quick stats, store management, auctions, order history, and payouts panels for approved vendors.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor product management page that gates access behind identity and approval checks, then renders the ProductListManager for the stored vendor ID.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: Vendor registration page that shows a registration form for unapproved users, a pending state after submission, and a dashboard link for already-approved vendors.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines all shared TypeScript types and interfaces for the frontend, including products, orders, auctions, trade offers, payouts, and search filters.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Provides utility functions for Stripe Checkout integration, including building success/cancel redirect URLs and parsing checkout session responses from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors, fonts, shadows, border radii, keyframes) using OKLCH CSS variables, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file listing two completed features (StoreListManager and StoreSelector integration) and three pending action requests (AR-1 through AR-3) for store management backend, React Query hooks, and StoreFormModal wiring.
